Metadata.title: Postext — Programmable Typesetter for the Web
Metadata.description: A layout engine that bridges centuries-old print typesetting craft with modern web technology. Semantic markdown in, publication-grade React components out.
Metadata.ogTitle: Postext — Programmable Typesetter for the Web
Metadata.ogDescription: Semantic markdown in, publication-grade React components out.

Navbar.githubAriaLabel: Postext on GitHub (opens in new tab)

Hero.title: The Programmable Typesetter for the Web
Hero.subtitle: Postext takes semantic markdown and applies centuries-old editorial layout rules — orphan prevention, column balancing, figure placement — producing publication-grade React components.

About.paragraph1: CSS gives you responsive layout — flexbox, grid, columns. But it cannot balance columns, prevent orphans, flow text around figures, or place footnotes at the bottom of a column. These are editorial decisions that have been refined over centuries of print typesetting.
About.paragraph2prefix: Postext bridges that gap. Feed it semantic markdown and a configuration object. It measures text 300–600× faster than the DOM using
About.paragraph2suffix: , then returns React components laid out to professional typographic standards.
About.outputAriaLabel: Visual representation of typeset output with balanced columns, figure placement, and footnotes

Features.title: What Print Typesetters Knew All Along
Features.orphanDescription: No single lines stranded at the top or bottom of a column. Postext enforces typographic rules that CSS cannot express.
Features.columnDescription: Content distributed evenly across columns so they end at the same height — the way a professional typesetter would set them.
Features.flowDescription: Images, pull quotes, and tables placed inline, floated, or in margins with text flowing naturally around them.
Features.footnotesDescription: Footnotes anchored to column bottoms. Margin notes aligned with the paragraph that references them. Endnotes collected at section end.
Features.hyphenationDescription: Intelligent word breaking and right-edge smoothing that prevents rivers of whitespace and produces even text blocks.
Features.outputDescription: One layout engine, two renderers. Generate React components for the web or PDF output for print — from the same source.

ApiPreview.title: One Function, Full Control
ApiPreview.description: Call createLayout with your content and a configuration object. Get back a React component laid out to your specifications.

HowItWorks.title: Three Steps to Publication-Grade Layout
HowItWorks.step1Description: Author your content in enriched markdown with resource references and footnote markers. No layout concerns — just content.
HowItWorks.step2Description: Define columns, typography rules, resource placement strategies, and section overrides in a PostextConfig object.
HowItWorks.step3Description: Call createLayout and receive a React component with pixel-perfect editorial layout — ready for the web or PDF.

CookieBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. Read our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and <cookieLink>Cookie Policy</cookieLink> for more information.
CookieBanner.necessaryDescription: Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
CookieBanner.analyticsDescription: Help us understand how visitors interact with the website.

PrivacyPolicy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the Postext website.
PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.controllerText: Postext is an open-source project. For privacy inquiries, please contact us via the project's GitHub repository.
PrivacyPolicy.dataCollectedText: This website does not collect personal data by default. We only store a cookie consent preference cookie on your device. If you consent to analytics or marketing cookies in the future, additional data may be collected as described in our Cookie Policy.
PrivacyPolicy.legalBasisText: We process data based on your consent (Article 6(1)(a) GDPR). Strictly necessary cookies are processed based on our legitimate interest in providing a functional website (Article 6(1)(f) GDPR).
PrivacyPolicy.cookiesText: For detailed information about the cookies we use, please see our <cookieLink>Cookie Policy</cookieLink>.
PrivacyPolicy.rightsText: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
PrivacyPolicy.rightAccess: Right of access — request a copy of your data
PrivacyPolicy.rightRectification: Right to rectification — request correction of inaccurate data
PrivacyPolicy.rightErasure: Right to erasure — request deletion of your data
PrivacyPolicy.rightPortability: Right to data portability — request your data in a portable format
PrivacyPolicy.rightObjection: Right to object — object to processing of your data
PrivacyPolicy.rightWithdraw: Right to withdraw consent — withdraw consent at any time via the cookie settings
PrivacyPolicy.childrenText: This website is a developer tool and is not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
PrivacyPolicy.contactText: For any privacy-related questions, please open an issue on the Postext GitHub repository or contact the project maintainers.

CookiePolicy.metaDescription: Cookie policy for the Postext website.
CookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
CookiePolicy.whatAreCookiesText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to remember your preferences and improve your experience.
CookiePolicy.cookiesWeUseText: Currently, this website uses only one cookie:
CookiePolicy.categoryNecessaryDesc: Essential for the website to function properly. These cookies cannot be disabled.
CookiePolicy.categoryAnalyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the website so we can improve it. Currently not in use.
CookiePolicy.categoryMarketingDesc: Used to deliver advertisements relevant to you. Currently not in use.
CookiePolicy.manageCookiesText: You can change your cookie preferences at any time using the cookie banner on our website. You can also delete cookies through your browser settings.
CookiePolicy.moreInfoText: For more details about how we handle your data, please see our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.

Sandbox.metaDescription: Experiment with the Postext layout engine in a live sandbox.
Sandbox.resourcesComingSoonDescription: Resource management will be available in a future version.
Sandbox.pdfComingSoonDescription: PDF export will be available in a future version.
Sandbox.pageSizeTooltip: Standard page format or custom dimensions
Sandbox.marginsTooltip: Space between the page edge and the content area
Sandbox.dpiTooltip: Dots per inch — controls the resolution of the page
Sandbox.cutLinesTooltip: Show trim marks at the page corners for print cutting
Sandbox.cutLinesBleedTooltip: Extra area beyond the trim edge — backgrounds extend into this zone to prevent white edges after cutting
Sandbox.cutLinesMarkLengthTooltip: Length of each crop mark line
Sandbox.cutLinesMarkOffsetTooltip: Gap between the trim edge and the start of the crop mark
Sandbox.cutLinesMarkWidthTooltip: Stroke thickness of the crop mark lines
Sandbox.cutLinesColorTooltip: Color of the crop mark lines
Sandbox.baselineGridTooltip: Show horizontal lines to align text baselines
Sandbox.baselineGridColorTooltip: Color of the baseline grid lines
Sandbox.baselineGridLineWidthTooltip: Thickness of the baseline grid lines
Sandbox.debugCursorSyncTooltip: Show the editor cursor position live on the canvas preview
Sandbox.debugCursorSyncColorTooltip: Color of the cursor indicator drawn over the canvas
Sandbox.debugSelectionSyncTooltip: Highlight the editor text selection live on the canvas preview
Sandbox.debugSelectionSyncColorTooltip: Fill color of the selection highlight drawn over the canvas
Sandbox.debugLooseLinesTooltip: Highlight justified lines where word-spacing exceeds the threshold (loose lines / rivers)
Sandbox.debugLooseLinesColorTooltip: Fill color used to mark loose lines on the preview
Sandbox.debugLooseLinesThresholdTooltip: Ratio of justified word-spacing to the normal space width. Lines above this value are flagged. Default 1.5 (150%).
Sandbox.debugPageNegativeTooltip: Apply an inverse (negative) color filter to the page content on the canvas
Sandbox.bodyFontTooltip: Font family for the body text
Sandbox.bodyFontSizeTooltip: Font size for the body text
Sandbox.bodyLineHeightTooltip: Vertical spacing between lines of text
Sandbox.bodyParagraphSpacingTooltip: When enabled, insert a blank line (equal to line height) between consecutive paragraphs
Sandbox.bodyBoldColorTooltip: Default color for bold text in body paragraphs. When unset, inherits the text color.
Sandbox.bodyItalicColorTooltip: Default color for italic text in body paragraphs. When unset, inherits the text color.
Sandbox.bodyTextAlignTooltip: Horizontal alignment of body text paragraphs
Sandbox.bodyHyphenationTooltip: Enable automatic hyphenation for justified text
Sandbox.bodyBoldFontWeightTooltip: Weight for bold text in body paragraphs (100-900)
Sandbox.bodyFirstLineIndentTooltip: Indent applied to the first line of each paragraph
Sandbox.bodyHangingIndentTooltip: When enabled, all lines except the first are indented (French indent)
Sandbox.bodyMaxWordSpacingTooltip: Maximum allowed word-spacing when justifying, expressed as a multiplier of the natural space width. The engine prefers breaks that stay within this bound (best-effort via hyphenation).
Sandbox.bodyMinWordSpacingTooltip: Minimum allowed word-spacing when justifying, expressed as a multiplier of the natural space width.
Sandbox.bodyOptimalLineBreakingTooltip: Use the Knuth-Plass algorithm for globally optimal line breaks instead of greedy first-fit.
Sandbox.bodyAvoidOrphansTooltip: Discourage leaving a paragraph's last line(s) alone at the top of the next column.
Sandbox.bodyOrphanMinLinesTooltip: Minimum number of lines required at the top of the next column when a paragraph is split.
Sandbox.bodyOrphanPenaltyTooltip: Demerit added when the orphan constraint is violated. Higher = stronger avoidance; 0 disables the penalty.
Sandbox.bodyAvoidWidowsTooltip: Discourage starting a paragraph with a single line at the bottom of the current column.
Sandbox.bodyWidowMinLinesTooltip: Minimum number of lines required at the bottom of the current column when a paragraph is split.
Sandbox.bodyWidowPenaltyTooltip: Demerit added when the widow constraint is violated. Higher = stronger avoidance; 0 disables the penalty.
Sandbox.bodySlackWeightTooltip: Cost per squared unit of unused column height. Higher values make the layout prefer filling columns; 0 disables the pressure.
Sandbox.bodyAvoidRuntsTooltip: Discourage paragraphs from ending with a very short last line (e.g. a single short word).
Sandbox.bodyRuntMinCharactersTooltip: Approximate minimum characters on the last line (converted internally to a width threshold via the normal space width).
Sandbox.bodyRuntPenaltyTooltip: Demerit added when the final line of a paragraph is shorter than the runt threshold. Higher = stronger avoidance; 0 disables the penalty.
Sandbox.bodyAvoidRuntsInListsTooltip: When on, list items get the same runt penalty as paragraphs. Turn off to limit runt avoidance to regular paragraphs only.
Sandbox.bodyAvoidOrphansInListsTooltip: When on, list items get the same orphan protection as paragraphs. Turn off to limit orphan avoidance to regular paragraphs only.
Sandbox.bodyAvoidWidowsInListsTooltip: When on, list items get the same widow protection as paragraphs. Turn off to limit widow avoidance to regular paragraphs only.
Sandbox.bodyKeepColonWithListTooltip: When a paragraph ending in a colon introduces a list, keep the colon-bearing line in the same column as the first list item. If the list would not fit after the paragraph, only the last line (or the whole paragraph, if single-line) is pushed to the next column.
Sandbox.headingsFontTooltip: Default font family for all headings
Sandbox.headingsLineHeightTooltip: Default line height for all headings
Sandbox.headingsFontWeightTooltip: Default font weight for all headings (100-900)
Sandbox.headingsMarginTopTooltip: Default space above headings (skipped at top of column)
Sandbox.headingsKeepWithNextTooltip: Prevent a heading from being placed alone at the end of a column or page. If the following text would not have at least one line of room after the heading, the heading moves to the next column with it.
Sandbox.headingFontSizeTooltip: Font size for this heading level
Sandbox.headingLineHeightTooltip: Override line height for this heading level
Sandbox.headingFontTooltip: Override font for this heading level
Sandbox.headingColorTooltip: Override color for this heading level
Sandbox.headingFontWeightTooltip: Override font weight for this heading level
Sandbox.headingMarginTopTooltip: Space above this heading level (skipped at top of column)
Sandbox.headingMarginBottomTooltip: Minimum space below this heading level
Sandbox.headingNumberingTemplateTooltip: Template for this level's number prefix. Use '{'N'}' for the counter at level N, '{'N:style'}' to pick a numeral style (1, 01, A, a, I, i). Examples: "'{'1'}'.", "'{'1'}'.'{'2'}'", "'{'2:A'}'.'{'3'}'". Empty = no numbering.
Sandbox.headingItalicTooltip: Render this heading level in italic style
Sandbox.unorderedListsFontTooltip: Default font family used to render list bullets (inherits from body text when unset)
Sandbox.unorderedListsColorTooltip: Default color for list bullets (inherits from body text when unset)
Sandbox.unorderedListsFontWeightTooltip: Default font weight for list bullets (100-900)
Sandbox.unorderedListsBulletCharTooltip: Glyph used as the default bullet for every depth level
Sandbox.unorderedListsBulletFontSizeTooltip: Font size for the bullet glyph (em is relative to body text)
Sandbox.unorderedListsGapTooltip: Horizontal distance between the bullet and the start of the item text
Sandbox.unorderedListsIndentTooltip: Base indent per depth level — level N defaults to this value × N. Set to 0 to pin bullets to the column edge.
Sandbox.unorderedListsBulletVerticalOffsetToolti: Fine-tune bullet vertical position. Negative values raise the bullet, positive values lower it.
Sandbox.unorderedListsMarginTopTooltip: Space before the first item of a list
Sandbox.unorderedListsMarginBottomTooltip: Space after the last item of a list
Sandbox.unorderedListsItemSpacingTooltip: Extra vertical space between consecutive list items
Sandbox.unorderedListsHangingIndentTooltip: When enabled, wrapped lines align to the text start instead of the bullet column
Sandbox.unorderedListLevelBulletCharTooltip: Override the bullet character for this depth level
Sandbox.unorderedListLevelFontTooltip: Override the bullet font for this depth level
Sandbox.unorderedListLevelFontSizeTooltip: Override the bullet font size for this depth level
Sandbox.unorderedListLevelColorTooltip: Override the bullet color for this depth level
Sandbox.unorderedListLevelFontWeightTooltip: Override the bullet font weight for this depth level
Sandbox.unorderedListLevelItalicTooltip: Render this depth level bullet in italic
Sandbox.unorderedListLevelIndentTooltip: Horizontal indent from the column edge to the bullet for this depth level
Sandbox.unorderedListLevelVerticalOffsetTooltip: Override vertical nudge for this depth level. Negative = up, positive = down.
Sandbox.taskCheckboxCharTooltip: Glyph used as the checkbox for pending task items (`- [ ]`).
Sandbox.taskCheckedCharTooltip: Glyph used as the checkbox for completed task items (`- [x]`).
Sandbox.taskCompletedStrikethroughTooltip: Draw a line through the text of completed task items.
Sandbox.taskCompletedColorTooltip: Text color for completed task items. When unset, the body color is used.
Sandbox.orderedListsFontTooltip: Default font family used to render ordered list numbers (inherits from body text when unset).
Sandbox.orderedListsColorTooltip: Default color for ordered list numbers (inherits from body text when unset).
Sandbox.orderedListsFontWeightTooltip: Default font weight for ordered list numbers (100-900).
Sandbox.orderedListsItalicTooltip: Render ordered list numbers in italic.
Sandbox.orderedListsNumberFormatTooltip: Default numbering format for every depth level.
Sandbox.orderedListsNumberFontSizeTooltip: Font size for the numbers (em is relative to body text).
Sandbox.orderedListsGapTooltip: Horizontal distance between the number+separator and the start of the item text.
Sandbox.orderedListsIndentTooltip: Base indent for level 1. Deeper levels cascade from their parent unless overridden.
Sandbox.orderedListsNumberVerticalOffsetTooltip: Fine-tune number vertical position. Negative values raise, positive values lower.
Sandbox.orderedListsMarginTopTooltip: Space before the first item of a list.
Sandbox.orderedListsMarginBottomTooltip: Space after the last item of a list.
Sandbox.orderedListsItemSpacingTooltip: Extra vertical space between consecutive list items.
Sandbox.orderedListsHangingIndentTooltip: When enabled, wrapped lines align to the text start instead of the number column.
Sandbox.orderedListLevelNumberFormatTooltip: Override the numbering format for this depth level.
Sandbox.orderedListLevelSeparatorTooltip: Override the separator for this depth level.
Sandbox.orderedListLevelFontTooltip: Override the number font for this depth level.
Sandbox.orderedListLevelFontSizeTooltip: Override the number font size for this depth level.
Sandbox.orderedListLevelColorTooltip: Override the number color for this depth level.
Sandbox.orderedListLevelFontWeightTooltip: Override the number font weight for this depth level.
Sandbox.orderedListLevelItalicTooltip: Render this depth level number in italic.
Sandbox.orderedListLevelIndentTooltip: Horizontal indent from the column edge to the number column for this depth level.
Sandbox.orderedListLevelVerticalOffsetTooltip: Override vertical nudge for this depth level. Negative = up, positive = down.
Sandbox.layoutTypeTooltip: Column layout mode for the content area
Sandbox.sideColumnPercentTooltip: Width of the side column as a percentage of the content area
Sandbox.columnRuleTooltip: Show a vertical line between columns
Sandbox.columnRuleColorTooltip: Color of the column rule line
Sandbox.columnRuleLineWidthTooltip: Thickness of the column rule line
Sandbox.htmlViewerMaxCharsPerLineTooltip: Target line length used to size the reading column — drives both single-column width and how many columns fit in multi-column mode
Sandbox.htmlViewerColumnGapTooltip: Horizontal spacing between columns when the HTML viewer is in multi-column mode
Sandbox.htmlViewerOptimalLineBreakingTooltip: Use Knuth-Plass optimal line breaking in the HTML viewer. Off by default for performance — the global body-text setting is overridden here only for HTML rendering
Sandbox.heading: Heading
Sandbox.resetMarkdownConfirm: Replace content with the default example?
Sandbox.colorPaletteTooltip: Named colors reusable across all color fields. Changing an entry updates every reference.
Sandbox.colorPaletteDeleteInUseNote: These properties will keep the color but lose the link.
